features.name: caption actor
features.summary: `caption("text") at top|bottom|center` — auto-positioned text overlay centered on the scene.
features.example: actor title = caption("The Demo") at top

features.name: chapter blocks
features.summary: `scene "title" { ... }` — named blocks group timeline events into chapters.

features.name: @+N: relative time
features.summary: `@+N:` — schedules an event N seconds after the previous event's end in the same scope.

features.name: exit action
features.summary: `actor.exit(to=left|right|top|bottom)` — mirror of enter: slides off-screen and fades to opacity 0.

features.name: import statements
features.summary: `import "path.markdy" as ns` — host-resolved composition of vars, defs, and seqs.

features.name: preset expansion
features.summary: `preset <name>(args...)` — expands at parse time to a full scene template.

features.name: !action must-understand prefix
features.summary: `actor.!action(...)` — hard-fail on unknown actions. Without `!`, unknowns soft-warn.

features.name: unified with-modifier form
features.summary: `with key=val, key=val` — modifier form alongside the space-separated `scale 1.5 rotate 10` syntax.
features.example: actor box1 = box() at (100, 100) with scale=1.2, opacity=0.85, rotate=12

features.name: figure-only type check
features.summary: Figure-only actions (`punch`, `kick`, `wave`, `nod`, `face`, `pose`, `rotate_part`) error on non-figure targets.
features.example:
# Type check: `text` actors cannot use `punch`
# @0.0: label.punch(...)   → ParseError

warningKinds.emittedWhen: an action name is not in the parser's known set
a `camera.*` call uses an unsupported action
a `with key=val` or space-form key is not a known modifier
the `scene` declaration has an unrecognized property
an `import ... as ns` has no matching host-provided namespace
